nasb.text: And thus I aspired to preach the gospel, not where Christ was already named, so that I would not build on another man’s foundation;

esv.text: and thus I make it my ambition to preach the gospel, not where Christ has already been named, lest I build on someone else’s foundation,

cnv.text: 我立定主意，不在宣揚過基督的地方傳福音，免得建立在別人的根基上，

ccb.text: 我立志只去从未听过基督之名的地方传福音，免得我建造在别人的根基上。

csbs.text: 这样，我立定心志要在基督的名没有被传过的地方传福音，免得建造在别人的根基上，
